pattern: Sliding window of fixed length k to count subarrays whose average meets a threshold.
hints: Use a sliding window of size k; maintain a running sum to avoid recomputing from scratch each step.
At each position where the window is full, check if sum >= k * threshold (avoids floating-point division).
Slide right by subtracting the element leaving and adding the element entering the window.

edge_inputs.description: all subarrays qualify with threshold zero

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    arr = [rng.randint(1, 10000) for _ in range(size)]
    k = rng.randint(1, size)
    threshold = rng.randint(0, 10000)
    return [arr, k, threshold]
